title: My Heart is Not Exalted Lord

verses.text: My heart is not exalted, Lord, Nor lofty is my eye. I’m not consumed with things too great, Nor things for me too high, Nor things for me too high.
But I have calmed and stilled my soul, Just like a little child Now weaned, he on his mother rests, With soul content and mild, With soul content and mild.
O Isr’el, put your hope in God; Now rest upon the Lord. And trust in him from this time forth, Both now and evermore, Both now and evermore.
